scene_title: Câmara de interrogatório — Ministério do Amor
narrative_beat: Wide of sterile P&B interrogation chamber with metal chair, surgical light, golden pedestal with rat cage

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a sterile underground interrogation chamber with a central metal chair bolted to the floor
subject.focal_point: a golden ornate pedestal to the right holding a metal cage with rats
subject.secondary: Surgical overhead light. White tiled walls desaturated. Iron door at back.

environment.location: basement interrogation chamber of the Ministry of Love

composition.foreground: golden pedestal and golden key props in rich gold and crimson
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white tiled chamber and chair

lighting.rim_light: gold rim on pedestal and cage

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.secondary: rats as each man's specific horror

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
